issues.sample: I PURCHASED A VW GOLF 2020 ON AUGUST 18TH, WHAT HAPPENED TO ME A WEEK LATER NOT ONLY DISAPPOINTED ME BUT ALSO SACRED ME. I DROVE THE CAR ON THE STREET AT THE SPEED ABOUT 25MPH, THE VEHICLE SUDDENLY DIED! I TRIED TO CONTROL THE VEHICLE, I STEPPED ON THE BRAKE AND PEDAL, IT DIDN'T

The contact owns a 2022 Volkswagen Golf. The contact stated that while driving at various speeds, the check engine warning light remained illuminated. The vehicle was taken to an independent mechanic, and it was determined that there was a leak in the evaporative emissions system

The contact owns a 2022 Volkswagen Golf. The contact stated that while driving at various speeds, the check engine warning light remained illuminated. The vehicle was taken to an independent mechanic, and it was determined that there was a leak in the evaporative emissions system

While driving with the cruise control set to 55 mph, the car began an uncommanded acceleration.  When I looked down on the dashboard display I noticed that the cruise control target speed was set to 95 mph.  I switched of the cruise control and resumed manual control of the speed

narrative.headline: What 2020 Volkswagen Golf owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (33% of reports).

issues.sample: While driving with the cruise control set to 55 mph, the car began an uncommanded acceleration.  When I looked down on the dashboard display I noticed that the cruise control target speed was set to 95 mph.  I switched of the cruise control and resumed manual control of the speed
